price_sensitivity.description: Moderate price sensitivity, more focused on value matching

satisfaction_level.description: Overall satisfaction is high, with certain requirements for service quality

amenities_importance.description: Values supporting facilities and expects a complete service experience

consumption_patterns.spending_behavior: Low consumption frequency, but high expectations for each visit

venue_preferences.preference_description: Prefers membership golf courses and other professional venues, pursuing professional and private experiences

persona_summary: This user group is mainly composed of young and middle-aged people aged 30-40, with a male majority. They are relatively price-sensitive, but also place great importance on the completeness of supporting facilities. Their consumption frequency is primarily once a month, and they prefer resort-type golf venues, pursuing a comprehensive leisure vacation experience. They are rational consumers who consider cost-effectiveness while pursuing quality.
